# Anders Tech — Gestao com Tecnologia
> Consultoria em gestao da qualidade e conformidade para a industria.

## About
Anders Tech is a quality management consultancy serving industrial companies in Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil. Founded by Daniel Anders, an electrical engineer with 15+ years of experience in business management and technology.

The company's key differentiator is data-driven diagnostics: analyzing real operational data (months of history, thousands of messages) to find hidden problems — not just filling compliance forms.

## Founder
Daniel Anders — Electrical Engineer, ISO 9001 Consultant, 15+ years in business management and technology. Based in Passo Fundo, RS, Brazil.

## Services

### ISO 9001 Implementation & Maintenance
Full implementation and maintenance of Quality Management Systems according to ISO 9001:2015. Preparation for certification audits and ongoing surveillance audits. Applicable to any industry sector.

### PBQP-H Qualification
Qualification for Brazil's Quality and Productivity Program for Housing (Programa Brasileiro da Qualidade e Produtividade do Habitat). Required for construction companies to access government housing financing (Minha Casa Minha Vida / Casa Verde e Amarela) and public tenders.

### Process Optimization
Workflow mapping, bottleneck identification, and rework reduction using data analysis. Transforms documentation requirements into real productivity gains. Typical results include 20-60% rework reduction.

### Non-Conformity & Corrective Action Systems
Root cause analysis (Ishikawa, 5 Whys, 8D) and corrective action systems that prevent recurrence. Systematic treatment of non-conformities aligned with ISO 9001 clause 10.2.

## Case Studies

### Case 1: PILI Industrial
ISO 9001 implementation integrated with digital monitoring tools. Achieved certification with fully digitalized processes and real-time quality indicators.

### Case 2: PBQP-H Qualification (via Sebrae partnership)
Residential construction company qualified for PBQP-H, enabling access to government housing financing and public construction tenders.

### Case 3: Metallurgy Operational Diagnostic
Analysis of 18 months of operational communication (25,000+ messages) revealed rework running at 400% above target and risk of losing the largest client. Action plan implemented in 90 days, reducing rework by 60% in the first quarter.

### Case 4: Agricultural Cooperative QMS
Quality management system adapted to cooperative operations — standardizing receiving, processing, and shipping with full traceability. 35% reduction in product non-conformities.

### Case 5: Food Industry Process Optimization
Complete production line mapping identified 12 waste points. Implementation of visual controls achieved positive ROI in 4 months and 22% productivity increase without equipment investment.

## Address
Rua Uruguai, 679 — Sala 201, Passo Fundo, RS 99010-112, Brazil

## Service Area
Primary: Passo Fundo, Erechim, Carazinho, Marau, and northern Rio Grande do Sul.
Extended: Caxias do Sul, Porto Alegre, Bento Goncalves, and all of RS with possibility of remote/hybrid engagements.

## Tools & Resources

### ROI Calculator
Interactive calculator that estimates the investment and return of ISO 9001 certification based on company revenue, employee count, sector, and motivation. Available at: https://anderstech.net/calculadora-roi-certificacao

### ISO 9001 Diagnostic Checklist (47 points)
Free diagnostic checklist covering 7 ISO 9001 categories: organizational context, leadership, planning, support & resources, operations, performance evaluation, and improvement. Available at: https://anderstech.net/checklist-iso-9001

## Blog Articles

### Quanto custa a certificacao ISO 9001? (How much does ISO 9001 certification cost?)
Comprehensive guide covering investment ranges by company size, cost components (consulting, certification body, internal costs), and ROI analysis. URL: https://anderstech.net/blog/quanto-custa-certificacao-iso-9001

### PBQP-H: o que e e para que serve? (PBQP-H: what is it and what is it for?)
Guide to Brazil's construction quality program, including qualification levels, requirements, benefits (financing access, tender eligibility), and implementation timeline. URL: https://anderstech.net/blog/pbqp-h-o-que-e-para-que-serve

### ISO 9001 vale a pena para metalurgica? (Is ISO 9001 worth it for metallurgy?)
Practical analysis of ISO 9001 benefits specific to the metallurgical sector: traceability, process control, customer requirements, and competitive advantage. URL: https://anderstech.net/blog/iso-9001-vale-a-pena-para-metalurgica

### Como reduzir retrabalho na producao (How to reduce rework in production)
Practical methods for eliminating waste on the factory floor: root cause analysis, standardized work procedures, visual management, and data-driven decision making. URL: https://anderstech.net/blog/como-reduzir-retrabalho-na-producao

### O que e ISO 9001 e por que sua empresa precisa (What is ISO 9001 and why your company needs it)
Comprehensive guide explaining what ISO 9001 is, how it works (PDCA, risk-based thinking), who needs it, real benefits, and how to start. Pillar content. URL: https://anderstech.net/blog/o-que-e-iso-9001

### Como conseguir a certificacao ISO 9001 (How to get ISO 9001 certified — Complete guide)
Step-by-step guide covering all stages: diagnostic, planning, documentation, implementation, internal audit, certification audit, and maintenance. URL: https://anderstech.net/blog/como-conseguir-certificacao-iso-9001

### ISO 9001 para industrias: beneficios e passo a passo (ISO 9001 for industries: benefits and step by step)
Industry-specific guide covering metallurgy, agribusiness, construction, and cooperatives. Measurable benefits and implementation roadmap. URL: https://anderstech.net/blog/iso-9001-para-industrias

### 5 erros que impedem sua empresa de ser certificada ISO 9001 (5 mistakes that prevent ISO 9001 certification)
Common pitfalls: excessive bureaucracy, single-person delegation, ignoring shop floor, vague objectives, wrong consultant choice. URL: https://anderstech.net/blog/erros-certificacao-iso-9001
